message: refactor(test): share internal hook and npm pack assertions

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+export function createInternalHookEventPayload(
+  type: string,
+  action: string,
+  sessionKey: string,
+  context: Record<string, unknown>,
+) {
+  return {
+    type,
+    action,
+    sessionKey,
+    context,
+    timestamp: new Date(),
+    messages: [],
+  };
+}
